McKinsey: ~70% of large-scale transformations fail; USD 900bn of USD 1.3tn wasted annually
McKinsey: failure due to insufficient aspirations, lack of compelling purpose, culture > technology as biggest obstacle
BCG study of 900 transformations: only 30% successful on timeline, budget, scope
BCG: 30% baseline success rate consistent across years
BCG: six success factors can flip odds from 30% to 80%
88% of projects with excellent change management succeed vs 13% with poor/absent change management
2024: industry moved toward extreme specialisation, boutique firms compete with Big 4 on senior-led delivery

Gartner 2024: 67% of vendor-led-advisory clients adopt vendor platform vs 23% for independent; Big 4 platform partnership revenue > USD 15bn (2024); Unity Advisory launched PE-backed in 2025 to stay conflict-free
By end-2024, 39% of ~35,000 SAP ECC customers had migrated to S/4HANA; 40%+ projected to stay on legacy ECC beyond 2027
61% of SAP customers cite budget; 48% integration; ~60% of completed S/4HANA programmes overran schedule
FSCA/PA Joint Standard 2 on Cybersecurity and Cyber Resilience came into force 1 June 2025; full compliance by 1 June 2026
Joint Standard scope: banks, insurers, retirement funds, FSPs, investment fund administrators
SARB Directive D3/2018 - Cloud Computing and Data Offshoring by Banks; effective 1 October 2018; requires board-approved data strategy
2025 SARB consultation paper proposes localisation mandates for cloud computing and data offshoring
SA SMB barriers: resource limits, digital skills, infrastructure; 78% say tech important; 81% see cloud essential
GSMA SA Driving Digital Transformation report (Nov 2024)

ADR-E empirical study: ADRs substantially improve transparency, traceability, stakeholder alignment
AWS Prescriptive Guidance: ADR process for architectural decisions
ERP selection: 68% fail before implementation; mid-market cycles 4-6 months, enterprise 12+ months; cost overruns 189% average, 215% discrete manufacturing; wrong vendor costs 12-18 months
McKinsey: 40% cite hierarchical cultures and siloed working as biggest digital momentum killer
SA M&A technology due diligence requires BEE, exchange control, ESG/POPIA evaluation
Architecture review: 20-30% IT cost reduction; licence optimisation 30-50%; infrastructure simplification 15-25%+20-40% ops; cloud optimisation 40-50%
Legacy modernisation: 38-52% TCO reduction documented; mid-sized European bank 38% savings in 18 months, 62% faster time-to-market
Programme rescue: GBP 12-28k assessment; case-study cost savings GBP 60k-800k+
Cost of inaction: 15-25% higher operational costs than digital leaders; 20-40% productivity gap
Structured 48-hour decision protocols; Compression Planning 6-step Fortune 500 framework
